message:
feat: add DuckDB and Polars comparisons to all pipeline benchmarks

- bench_hybrid_search: Add DuckDB + Polars for both vector-first and filter-first strategies
- bench_feature_engineering: Add DuckDB + Polars for z-score, log transform, feature crossing, binning
- bench_embedding_pipeline: Add DuckDB + Polars for text chunking and L2 normalization

Each benchmark now compares: LanceQL (native) vs DuckDB (SQL) vs Polars (Python DataFrame)
